evaluations.query: /research 'How does the authentication system work in this codebase?'
expected_behavior: Discovers relevant auth-related files across the codebase
Produces a structured research report with file:line references
Runs parallel discovery agents (codebase-locator, research-locator, pattern-finder)
Produces sequential analysis with evidence chains

evaluations.query: Research the database layer — what patterns are used, what are the constraints, and where are the bottlenecks?
expected_behavior: Identifies ORM patterns, query patterns, migration strategy
Synthesizes findings into structured output with code references
